source_configs.name: Micron IR
source_configs.type: Investor relations / latest news / quarterly results

source_configs.name: Transcript parser
source_configs.type: Keynote / earnings call / analyst Q&A parsing

alerts.title: NVDA mentions context memory or KV cache
alerts.condition: Trigger when transcript contains context memory, KV cache, memory hierarchy, or AI-native storage.
alerts.action: Send priority alert and recalculate readthrough scores.

alerts.title: MU raises HBM shipment or gross margin commentary
alerts.condition: Trigger when management upgrades HBM volumes, pricing discipline, or gross margin trajectory.
alerts.action: Update EPS bridge and mark near-term earnings sensitivity higher.

alerts.title: SNDK mentions design wins or customer sampling
alerts.condition: Trigger on design win, sampling, qualification, or production-ramp language.
alerts.action: Promote roadmap item into commercialization watchlist.

alerts.title: Any company cites slower deployment or delayed conversion
alerts.condition: Trigger on slower ramp, customer digestion, delay, qualification pushout, or lower shipment timing.
alerts.action: Flag as bearish timing risk and reduce delivery-speed score.

NVDA.label: AI factory / inference demand
NVDA.note: Broader system demand expands platform revenue opportunity.

NVDA.label: Deployment speed
NVDA.note: Validated deployment accelerates conversion; delays push revenue right.

NVDA.label: Networking + memory attach
NVDA.note: Higher full-stack attach can support richer blended margins.

MU.label: HBM shipments
MU.note: Shipment growth directly lifts AI memory revenue.

MU.label: Pricing discipline
MU.note: Constructive pricing improves gross margin and EPS conversion.

MU.label: AI server memory intensity
MU.note: Richer data-center mix can shift profitability upward.

SNDK.label: Context memory relevance
SNDK.note: Can rerate SNDK from commodity NAND to AI storage layer.

SNDK.label: Design wins / sampling
SNDK.note: Commercial validation is required for roadmap to become earnings.

SNDK.label: Tiered memory adoption
SNDK.note: Higher-value flash use cases can lift product mix and margin quality.

events.title: NVIDIA expands AI factory framing and highlights inference economics
events.text: Jensen emphasizes AI factory buildout, inference economics, system deployment, memory hierarchy, and tokens per second improvements.

readthrough.summary: Readthrough via HBM, DRAM/NAND mix, and AI server memory intensity.
Readthrough via NAND/SSD demand, context memory, and inference storage tier relevance.

events.title: Inference context memory platform reframes storage as AI infrastructure
events.text: NVIDIA introduces AI-native storage language around context memory, KV cache, and power efficiency for large-scale inference systems.

readthrough.summary: Strongest readthrough via NAND/SSD relevance to context memory and inference storage layers.
Positive readthrough via broader memory hierarchy and AI storage stack expansion.

events.title: Micron reports stronger HBM mix and disciplined pricing
events.text: Management highlights HBM shipments, improving gross margin, pricing discipline, and stronger data-center mix.

readthrough.summary: Positive demand confirmation for AI server platform intensity and memory-rich deployments.
Mixed readthrough. Positive on memory spend, but dollars may skew to HBM over flash in the near term.

events.title: Sandisk updates high-bandwidth flash roadmap for inference systems
events.text: Sandisk discusses high-bandwidth flash, memory wall constraints, design win progress, and tiered memory relevance for inference deployments.

readthrough.summary: Helpful if NVIDIA pushes inference memory hierarchy further into system architecture.
Mixed. Supports broader memory hierarchy, but may compete with some near-memory budgets.

events.title: Management says deployment speed increasingly depends on memory and networking balance
events.text: Analysts push on deployment speed, revenue timing, and AI factory conversion. Management mentions memory hierarchy and system bottlenecks.

readthrough.summary: Supports the idea that memory intensity and balance matter to deployment conversion.
Helpful if storage-tier language becomes more explicit in follow-on commentary.
